spec_match.rationale: Side-by-side `<use href=... #fragment>` vs bare-URL data: URL precisely demonstrates the spec change to SVG2 UseElement.

interactive.rationale: Reload button forces a re-resolve of every <use> and a JS probe reports a live bounding-box readout.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Feature index promises a comparison of fragment vs no-fragment forms; page delivers.

edge_cases.rationale: Covers the data: URL happy path but no http(s) external file, no <symbol>-wrapped sprite, and no error-state lane.

references.rationale: The see-also section now links to the correct ChromeStatus feature 5128141573718016.

design_system.rationale: All design tokens via CSS variables; data: SVG content uses hex but that is page content, not the design system.

openQuestions.title: Add an http external-file lane
openQuestions.detail: data: URLs cover the spec but the real use case is a separate icon.svg file. Add a third lane that points at a relative .svg URL hosted alongside the page.

summary: Tight before/after probe that nails the spec; the remaining gap is a hosted external SVG lane to complement the data URL examples.
